communications.message: We are investigating reports of delayed automated remediation actions. Threat detection and alert generation continue to operate normally. Our team is actively investigating the cause of the delay. We will provide an update within 30 minutes.

We have identified that automated remediation actions are experiencing delays due to an upstream service provider issue. Threat detection, email security scanning, and alert generation remain fully operational. Detected threats are being queued and will be remediated automatically once the upstream service recovers. We will provide an update within 30 minutes.

The upstream service has been restored and automated remediation actions are resuming. Our systems are processing the backlog of queued actions. Response times are returning to normal levels. We are monitoring closely to ensure full recovery.

This incident has been resolved. Automated remediation actions are operating normally and all queued actions have been processed.

Incident Summary:
- Start time: Approximately 8:25 AM PT
- Resolution time: 11:00 AM PT
- Duration: Approximately 2 hours 35 minutes
- Impact: Automated remediation actions were delayed due to an upstream service disruption. Threat detection remained fully operational throughout the incident.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.
